title: Herbarium Specimen Caption (simplified phenology)
description: JSON schema for the simplified herbarium caption. Phenology is a set of independent boolean presence flags; all other fields are unchanged from the original schema.

type.description: PH = herbarium sheet photo (pressed specimen), PI = in-situ photo (living plant).

attached_photo.description: Whether a separate printed or attached photograph is visible on the sheet.

foliage.description: Whether any leaves or needle-like structures are visible on the sheet.

foliage_type.description: Dominant leaf type. Use 'none' when foliage='absent'.

stem.description: Nature of the stem tissue on the pressed specimen.

phenology.description: Reproductive developmental state as independent presence flags. Reproductive traits only; vegetative structures do not count. Multiple flags may be true. All false = vegetative / no reproductive structures visible.

flower.description: Flower buds, open flowers, or an inflorescence visible.

fruit.description: Fruit at any stage (developing, mature, dehiscent), or bare seed, visible.

sporulating.description: Spore-bearing structures on a non-seed plant visible (sori/sporangia, strobili, sporophytes).

reproductive_unknown.description: A reproductive structure is clearly present but cannot be assigned to any category above.

fragment_packet.description: Whether a separate envelope, packet, or bag with additional plant fragments is visible.

label.description: Whether a printed or handwritten label card is visible on or near the specimen.

barcode.description: Whether a striped (1D) or 2D barcode is visible.

stamp.description: Whether an ink stamp, seal, or institutional mark is visible.

crc.description: Whether a color reference chart (CRC chart) is visible.

scale_bar.description: Whether a ruler, scale bar, or measurement reference is visible.
